CustomField.description: Auto checked if the "Household Too Large" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto checked if the "Household Too Large" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.label: IRC_Household Too Large
